message:
fix(web): improve HelpOverlay React keys and contextual badge visibility

Two minor improvements to HelpOverlay:

1. React key stability: Changed from `key={index}` to `key={hotkey.description}`
   - Action titles are unique in ActionRegistry, making them stable keys
   - Prevents potential reconciliation issues if list order changes

2. Contextual badge visibility: Fixed badge blending on odd rows
   - Before: backgroundColor=backgroundAlt blended with odd row backgrounds
   - After: backgroundColor=background + border for consistent visibility
   - Badge now contrasts properly on both transparent and backgroundAlt rows

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
